subcodes.first_line: O Jewel of the pure mine of Abraham! Your letter hath reached this station of poverty and nothingness, and its contents, like unto a gentle breeze [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای گوهر کان پاک حضرت خلیل نامه شما بمقام فقر و فنا واصل و مضامین مانند نسیم
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @consolation and comfort
